reasoning: Articles from July 2025 (e.g. July 4 and July 20) explicitly report that Beto O'Rourke remained undecided on running for the U.S. Senate seat. By November 2025 he said he was 'unlikely' to run, and by January 2026 news updates indicate he was refusing to take sides in the Democratic Senate primary between Jasmine Crockett and James Talarico. Thus, it is practically certain that he did not announce his candidacy before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
